title: LiteResearcher: Scalable Agentic RL for Deep Research

defines.name: LiteResearcher
defines.definition: A scalable agentic RL training framework that builds a virtual web-like world for training deep research agents through synthetic data, simulated search tools, and curriculum RL.

problem: Agentic RL for deep research is hard to scale because real-world search makes training unstable and expensive, while synthetic data often fails to capture genuine search behavior.
